company_overview.primary_theme: Record revenue and EPS driven by strong product and services performance.

guidance.reason_for_change: Foreign exchange headwinds expected to impact revenue.

segment_highlights.driver: 16% year-over-year growth driven by new product excitement.
New Apple Watch features and AirPods 4.

explicit_risks.risk: Foreign exchange headwinds impacting revenue growth.

capital_allocation.debt_activity: $1 billion in maturing debt repaid, $8 billion decrease in commercial paper.

causal_claims.claim: Markets with Apple Intelligence rollout saw stronger iPhone 16 performance.
causal_claims.evidence_reference: Tim Cook's remarks on iPhone sales.

high_signal_summary: Record revenue of $124.3 billion, up 4% year-over-year.
iPhone revenue at $69.1 billion, flat year-over-year.
Mac revenue grew 16% year-over-year to $9 billion.
iPad revenue increased 15% year-over-year to $8.1 billion.
Services revenue reached $26.3 billion, up 14% year-over-year.
Gross margin at 46.9%, up 70 basis points sequentially.
Installed base of active devices reached over 2.35 billion.
Strong growth in emerging markets, particularly India.
Guidance for March quarter includes low to mid-single-digit revenue growth.
Foreign exchange expected to negatively impact revenue by about 2.5 percentage points.
